title: chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.4.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|
| [golangci/golangci-lint](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint) | minor | `2.3.1` -> `2.4.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>golangci/golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint)</summary>

### [`v2.4.0`](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v240)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/compare/v2.3.1...v2.4.0)

1. Enhancements
   - 🎉 go1.25 support
2. Linters new features or changes
   - `exhaustruct`: from v3.3.1 to 4.0.0 (new options: `allow-empty`, `allow-empty-rx`, `allow-empty-returns`, `allow-empty-declarations`)
3. Linters bug fixes
   - `godox`: trim filepath from report messages
   - `staticcheck`: allow empty options
   - `tagalign`: from 1.4.2 to 1.4.3
4. Documentation
   - 🌟 New website (with a search engine)

</details>

---

### Configuration

📅 **Schedule**: Branch creation - At any time (no schedule defined), Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined).

🚦 **Automerge**: Disabled by config. Please merge this manually once you are satisfied.

♻ **Rebasing**: Never, or you tick the rebase/retry checkbox.

🔕 **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again.
